rationale: All AC items satisfied: container text-sm dropped from metadata grid and three sections; explicit text-body-md/text-body-sm/text-label-caps/text-mono-code applied per element; font-mono-code paired with text-mono-code; alert-caution and lifecycle items now use text-body-sm; pre elements carry font-mono-code text-mono-code.

font-mono-code added alongside text-mono-code at the two flagged spans (attempts and phase-elapsed).
